summary: Role 2 final consensus review completed for direct MCP parity after Role 8/9 revisions. P0-04 remains sufficient: it requires real client exact single-name proof artifacts, excludes hook/bootstrap/CLI/synthetic evidence, links status:mcp-direct/status:health/verify:goal/Observatory, includes negative tests, and is preserved by the new Observatory and install/release additions.
decisions: No regression found in P0-04 after Role 8/9 revisions.
Agreement is on the plan/acceptance criteria only, not implementation completion.
next_steps: Continue collecting same-round final AGREE verdicts from all ten reviewers.
Implementation still needs proof ingestion and real Codex/Claude direct MCP canaries.
